items.name: Potato Chilli
items.description: Potato wedges, deep fried and tossed with homemade chilli sauce.

items.description: Diced and fried cottage cheese stir-fried with capsicum, tomatoes, onion in homemade chilli sauce.

items.name: Buffalo Chicken Wings
items.description: Chicken wings marinated in Nepalese spices, and tossed in homemade spicy sauce, served with salad

items.name: Fried Sausage
items.description: Chicken sausage fried and drizzled with homemade spices.

items.name: Wai Wai Chatpat
items.description: Tangy, spicy and crunchy Wai wai noodles, puffed rice, tomato, onion, chilli, chickpea splash of lime and coriander.

items.name: Manchow Soup
items.description: A rich, thick broth made from a blend of soy sauce, garlic, ginger and a variety of spices garnished with crispy fried noodles.

items.name: Sweet Corn Soup
items.description: Thick soup cooked in a rich stock with corn and vegetables.

items.name: Steamed Momo
items.description: 12 Pcs/portion. Chicken, mutton, veg (seasonal vegetables, soyabean, mozzarella cheese, ginger and garlic) or paneer (cottage cheese, spinach, onion, ricotta cheese), served with spicy/sesame sauce.

items.name: Kothey / Fried Momo
items.description: 12 Pcs/portion. Chicken, mutton, veg or paneer, served with spicy/sesame sauce.

items.name: Jhol Momo
items.description: 12 Pcs/portion. Chicken, mutton, veg or paneer momo served in jhol soup.

items.name: Chilli / Manchurian Momo
items.description: 12 Pcs/portion. Chicken, mutton, veg or paneer momo tossed in chilli or manchurian sauce.

items.name: Trio Momo Platter
items.description: 12 Pcs/portion. 4 pcs steam, 4 pcs fried, 4 pcs chilli Momo.

items.name: Malai Momo
items.description: 12 Pcs/portion. Fried Momo tossed in creamy cheese sauce.

items.name: Tandoori Momo
items.description: 12 Pcs/portion. Momo marinated in spicy tandoori masala and roasted in tandoor and served with mint, coriander and mayo sauce.

items.name: Chowmein
items.description: Stir fried noodles cooked in Nepalese style with veggies, sauce and spices.

items.name: Schezwan Chowmein
items.description: Stir fried noodles seasoned with schezwan sauce.

items.name: Fried Rice
items.description: A classic dish featuring rice and vegetables, stir fried.

items.name: Schezwan Rice
items.description: A spicy and flavourful dish that combines stir-fried rice seasoned with schezwan sauce.

items.name: Thukpa
items.description: A traditional Tibetan noodle soup prepared in a rich and flavourful broth; chicken version includes tender noodles and chunks of succulent chicken in a rich, savory chicken stock.

items.name: Chop Suey
items.description: Stir fried dish, consisting of assorted vegetables, cooked in a thick soy sauce base and served over crispy fried noodles.

items.name: Khaja Set
items.description: Served with: Puffed rice, bhujja, radish, pickle, crunchy masala fried soya bean, spicy potato, black channa curry and salad.
